I had two keyflare wheels on her but it was only an E3 SSR wheel, and  she's only E2 so her natural keyflare is pretty low too. I'm still clearing content, it's just doesn't feel as strong as my other teams. Since I pull two standard Aequor character I was wondering If I may pull the current on the banner , Tulu  ^^
I think the current universal choice is kathi:  kathigu-ra E3 (that is, base kathi, and pull 3 copies of her)

You may look first at Cheri's guide (see likes above given by the bot) for a first, reliable opinion on the character.

Tulu is more a support, which mean: he doesn't define your team.
The first thing you must wonder is "who is my attacker?", and then figure if Tulu is a good support for it
Since it's a Assault I assume Goliath would be my dps ? I didn't understand well yet the "class" like chorus ^^
sadly, nyo, classes are more like a suggestion
goliath is actually an exalt support: you exalt him (ultimate), and he gives you a boost
oooh I see you chose Usurp then big dps turn

SRs are useful

but in practice the difference between SR and SSR units are:

- SR units are given for free and can be duped for "free" using mats you can grind
- SR units are cheaper to level than SSR
- SR units have less stats i believe?

Out of the 4, 3 is commonly used
Ramona for example is good even at low dupes
but since most if not all SR units are supports, they are valued by how much utility they prove... and some of them sit on top of the meta
